safetyNote: This media map anchors approved visuals to content sections without changing the approved content map schema. Website-side image-field wiring remains a separate responsibility.
transferSafetyRule: Codefy OS never writes to Sanity. It only prepares media outputs.

entries.recommendedVisual: Trip analytics panel showing trip playback review, planned versus actual comparison, speeding, phone usage, harsh braking, and harsh acceleration proof points.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Support the Operators and Drivers page with concrete analytics proof for execution review and exception handling.
entries.sourceTruth: Real Tranzkit trip_analysis_screen capture from the approved trip analysis route, cropped to remove identifying trip header and precise map details.
entries.assetMethodNote: Use a tuned screenshot first. If later review needs a broader or more polished composition, rebuild it in Figma while keeping the analytics claims product-authentic.

alt.en: Trip analytics view showing safety score, planned versus actual comparison, and driver behavior insights.
alt.ar: واجهة تحليلات رحلة تعرض درجة السلامة ومقارنة المخطط بالفعلي ومؤشرات سلوك السائق.

entries.captureNotes: Replaced the earlier crop with a new capture taken from the current live Trip Analysis view. This version keeps the map and analytics together, removes the identifying trip header, and trims the right and bottom whitespace.
entries.productionNotes: Wave 1 review asset generated as a 1200x800 PNG from the approved raw Trip Analysis capture. The crop keeps the map and analytics together and avoids browser chrome, trip IDs, and query strings.
entries.privacyNotes: The review crop removes the identifying trip header and query state. The map remains generalized at review size and does not expose exact private addresses, but it still represents a real trip route at broad area level.
approvalChecklist: No trip ids, query strings, driver names, vehicle plates, or exact route map details are visible.
Planned versus actual, phone usage, and behavior metrics remain readable.
If marketing framing is added later, it must stay secondary to the real product capture.

entries.recommendedVisual: AI agents embedded inside the operations workflow with schedule validation, assignment gap review, trip analytics review, report generation, and controlled update review.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Support the AI Impact section with a factual embedded-AI workflow visual for operators and drivers.
entries.sourceTruth: Faithful marketing recreation grounded in Daily Operations workflows, trip analysis review, and supplier-linked reporting concepts already present in Tranzkit.
entries.assetMethodNote: Use a Figma recreated mockup because the approved AI narrative needs a clean embedded-workflow composition without exposing operational PII.

alt.en: Operations workspace showing AI-assisted validation, analytics review, and controlled reporting inside the workflow.
alt.ar: مساحة تشغيل تعرض التحقق المدعوم بالذكاء الاصطناعي ومراجعة التحليلات والتقارير المنظمة داخل سير العمل.

approvalChecklist: AI must appear inside a real workflow surface, not as a detached chatbot bubble.
Do not imply autonomous dispatch or autonomous financial approval.
Use safe demo labels and only supported Tranzkit workflow concepts.

mediaQualityRule.guidance: Tune app state before recreating in Figma. Recreated mockups must stay faithful to approved Tranzkit capabilities and approved scope.

mediaLanguagePolicy.currentRule: One image asset in Sanity, bilingual CMS text around it, and bilingual alt text in the media plan.
rules: Use a single shared media asset by default for English and Arabic pages.
Do not create separate English and Arabic images unless the asset contains large embedded text or truly needs RTL-specific layout treatment.
Avoid large English or Arabic text baked into images.
If a Figma frame needs text, keep it minimal and brand-neutral, such as the Tranzkit logo only.
If an asset ever becomes locale_specific_required, do not move it to ready_for_transfer until website-side localized image support or an approved workaround exists.
